top_signals.title: Worst Indonesian Credit Volatility in Years Imperils Debt Boom
top_signals.summary: The highest volatility in rupiah corporate bonds in four years is threatening to dent record issuance by companies in Southeast Asia’s largest economy at a time when government policy swings have hurt international investor confidence in Indonesian assets.
